Follow-Up
§ 01Thanks for Connecting

Hi {{contactName}},

Thanks for accepting my connection request. I appreciate you taking the time, and I wanted to follow up with a brief note so this doesn't just sit as another silent connection.

§ 02Why I Reached Out

{{connectionContext}}

I've been looking to connect with people who understand the challenges and opportunities that come with business ownership and transitions — and your background stood out.

§ 03What We Do

Forhemit is a stewardship firm that helps business owners explore ESOP transitions — converting their company into an employee-owned business while achieving a fair exit. We work alongside owners through the entire process, from initial assessment through closing and the years that follow.

It's a path that creates a meaningful legacy for employees while giving owners a tax-advantaged exit. We find it's often a better fit than people expect.

§ 04No Agenda

I want to be straightforward — there's no pitch here. I'm not reaching out because I need something. I'm genuinely interested in learning about your work and building a real connection.

If ESOPs ever come up in your world, great. If not, that's perfectly fine too. Good relationships are worth more than any single transaction.

§ 05Open Invitation

If you're ever curious about ESOPs — whether for a client, a company you advise, or just out of professional interest — I'm always happy to hop on a quick call. No preparation needed, no commitment. Just a conversation.

Feel free to reach out anytime. I'd enjoy getting to know you better.

deals@forhemit.com
{{ref}}
—Forhemit Transition Stewardship
